docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT JONES, AVIS PLAINTIFF MAY NOT FILE MORE THAN TWO SMALL CLAIMS ACTIONS EXCEEDING $2500 IN A CALENDAR YEAR.
